title: Access' Gobblefin
description: Created by Access for the video "Minecraft Live 2024: Vote for the Lurker?". This mod adds the winner of the Mob Vote, the Gobblefin!
body:
This project was created for Access' Mob Votes. Do not expect consistent updates or new versions.

**Go CHECK out the Mob Vote:**
▶ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mYKGmN-qLzU

The GOBBLEFIN won the Mob Vote! 

Let me introduce you to the Ocean’s new predator, the Gobblefin. It spawns in the deep waters, constantly picking up any loose items. But, occasionally it might end up eating the player as well. 

The gobblefin can be tamed using some red mushroom, and doing so will grant you FULL CONTROL of the fish and its powers.
